audits.cleanReason: Reviewed the chapter's actual negation pivots and kept six that do structural work: Sylvanas's literal visibility limit, Jaina's binary "Not random" threat read, Lor'themar's two capability-boundary lines, one spatial correction ("not the bars"), and the explicit "doors do not open tonight" constraint.

clusterFlags: trial and aftermath sections carry four abstract-or-institutional agency smears in Sylvanas's analytic narration

findings.subject: floor
findings.realAgent: Sylvanas's destabilized reaction to realizing the pattern is targeted
findings.reason: The line launders Sylvanas's bodily jolt onto the floor instead of naming her reaction.

findings.line: Pain flattened everything in Jaina's face except the hard set of her mouth.
findings.subject: Pain
findings.realAgent: Jaina holding herself rigid under visible pain
findings.reason: The sentence gives pain control over Jaina's expression instead of locating the strain in Jaina herself.
findings.suggestedFix: Jaina's face went flat with pain except for the hard set of her mouth.

findings.line: Antonidas stayed standing one breath too long, then sat because he had found the end of whatever leash Dalaran had put around his throat and discovered it was iron.
findings.subject: Dalaran
findings.realAgent: the political authorities constraining Antonidas's public action
findings.reason: The line puts deliberate physical pressure on the institution instead of naming Antonidas's political restraint directly.
findings.suggestedFix: Antonidas stayed standing one breath too long, then sat because the leash around his throat was iron.

findings.line: Whatever time men with seals might imagine while they wrote letters and filed orders had already burned away.
findings.subject: time
findings.realAgent: bureaucratic delay consuming the remaining window
findings.reason: The sentence gives time its own combustion instead of naming the administrative delay that's erasing it.
findings.suggestedFix: Whatever time men with seals might imagine while they wrote letters and filed orders was already gone.

audits.cleanReason: Counted the capped tic families in this chapter: one corner-of-mouth beat, one emotional mouth-tightening beat plus two physical chain-tightening beats under the limit, and no overflow in marked, gaze, weight, or performance-tag usage.

summary.verdictReason: Pass A still has four mild intent-smear kills. With more than three mild-only kills and no higher-severity findings, the pass fails under the pass rule.
